_comment: Facing-pip demo (#399, drill mode -- player army only): zoomed in past LOD_ZOOM_IN (1.55) so the figure silhouettes are active, select the Infantry block (seed 12345, uid 1 at ~650,300, facing south), quarter-turn right (E) then left (Q) back. At figure LOD the body silhouette only mirrors left/right, so without the facing pip a 90-degree turn would be invisible here; the small white pip on each soldier rotates to the exact facing so the turn reads correctly even zoomed in.
